title: 你喝什么咖啡？
pinyin: Nǐ hē shén me kā fēi?
description_uz: «Har kuni qahva ichasanmi?» — qahva haqidagi ikki do'stning suhbati. Bu dialog qahva odati, amerikano va latte farqi (achchiq/shirin), qahvani qayerdan olish, narxlar va qahva madaniyatining ommalashuvini muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Ты каждый день пьёшь кофе?» — разговор двух друзей о кофе. Диалог тренирует, как обсудить кофейную привычку, разницу между американо и латте (горький/сладкий), где покупать кофе, цены и растущую популярность кофе. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Do you drink coffee every day?» — a chat between two friends about coffee. This dialogue practices talking about a coffee habit, the difference between americano and latte (bitter/sweet), where to buy coffee, prices, and coffee's growing popularity. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān hē kā fēi ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you drink coffee every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 喝，我每天早上都要喝一杯。
sentences.pinyin: Hē, wǒ měi tiān zǎo shang dōu yào hē yì bēi.
sentences.text_translation: Ichaman, har kuni ertalab bir piyola ichaman.
sentences.text_translation_en: I do — I have a cup every morning.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你为什么这么喜欢咖啡？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ wèi shén me zhè me xǐ huan kā fēi?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why do you like coffee so much?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hē kā fēi ràng wǒ gèng yǒu jīng shén.
sentences.text_translation: Qahva ichish menga ko'proq tetiklik beradi.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hē shén me kā fēi?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 美式咖啡，不加糖也不加奶。
sentences.pinyin: Měi shì kā fēi, bù jiā táng yě bù jiā nǎi.
sentences.text_translation: Amerikano, na shakar na sut qo'shaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Американо, без сахара и без молока.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Měi shì tài kǔ le, wǒ hē ná tiě.
sentences.text_translation: Amerikano juda achchiq, men latte ichaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Американо слишком горький, я пью латте.
sentences.text_translation_en: Americano is too bitter — I drink lattes.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Ná tiě tài tián le, róng yì pàng.
sentences.text_translation: Latte juda shirin, semirib ketish oson.
sentences.text_translation_en: Lattes are too sweet — easy to gain weight.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zài nǎr mǎi kā fēi?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where do you buy your coffee?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Gōng sī lóu xià jiù yǒu kā fēi diàn.
sentences.text_translation_en: There's a coffee shop right downstairs from my company.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 美式十五块，拿铁二十块。
sentences.pinyin: Měi shì shí wǔ kuài, ná tiě èr shí kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Amerikano o'n besh yuan, latte yigirma yuan.
sentences.speaker: B
